funds.name: SBI Liquid Fund
funds.desc_en: Best for emergency fund and parking idle money. Withdraw anytime within 1 business day.
funds.desc_hi: Emergency fund aur idle paise park karne ke liye best. Kabhi bhi withdraw kar sakte hain.

funds.name: Post Office FD
funds.desc_en: Government-backed fixed deposit. Zero risk, guaranteed returns. Best for conservative investors.
funds.desc_hi: Government-backed FD. Zero risk, guaranteed returns. Conservative investors ke liye best.

funds.name: Parag Parikh Conservative Fund
funds.desc_en: Slightly better returns than FD with similar safety. Good for 1–2 year goals.
funds.desc_hi: FD se thoda better returns, same safety. 1-2 saal ke goals ke liye achha.

funds.name: SBI Bluechip Fund
funds.desc_en: Invests in top 100 Indian companies. Steady growth with moderate risk. Ideal for 3+ year horizon.
funds.desc_hi: Top 100 Indian companies mein invest karta hai. Steady growth, moderate risk. 3+ saal ke liye ideal.

funds.name: HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund
funds.desc_en: Auto-balances between equity and debt based on market conditions. Less volatility, decent returns.
funds.desc_hi: Market conditions ke basis pe equity aur debt automatically balance karta hai. Less risk, decent returns.

funds.name: Mirae Asset Emerging Bluechip
funds.desc_en: Mix of established and rising companies. Better returns than pure large cap with manageable risk.
funds.desc_hi: Established aur rising companies ka mix. Pure large cap se better returns, manageable risk.

funds.name: Axis ELSS Tax Saver Fund
funds.desc_en: Save up to ₹46,800 tax under Section 80C AND get high equity returns. 3-year lock-in.
funds.desc_hi: Section 80C mein ₹46,800 tak tax bachao AUR high returns pao. 3 saal ka lock-in.

funds.name: Nippon India Small Cap Fund
funds.desc_en: High risk, high reward. Invests in small growing companies. Can drop sharply but recovers strongly.
funds.desc_hi: High risk, high reward. Chhoti growing companies mein invest. Sharply drop ho sakta hai par recover bhi karta hai.

funds.name: PGIM India Flexi Cap Fund
funds.desc_en: Fund manager freely picks best stocks across company sizes. Aggressive growth strategy.
funds.desc_hi: Fund manager freely best stocks choose karta hai sab sizes mein. Aggressive growth strategy.

low.description_en: You prefer safety over high returns. FDs and Liquid Funds are your friends.
low.description_hi: Aap safety prefer karte ho high returns ke over. FDs aur Liquid Funds aapke best friends hain.

medium.description_en: You want good returns with manageable risk. Hybrid and Large Cap funds work well.
medium.description_hi: Aap achhe returns chahte ho manageable risk ke saath. Hybrid aur Large Cap funds best hain.

high.description_en: You are comfortable with market volatility for maximum long-term growth.
high.description_hi: Aap market volatility ke saath comfortable ho maximum long-term growth ke liye.
